title: Build timestamp correlator (audio + clicks + screenshots)
description: Given a session's transcript.json and clicks.json, correlate audio timestamps with click timestamps to create a unified timeline. For each click, find what was being said at that moment. For each transcript segment, find what was on screen. Output: a merged timeline JSON that the analysis engine can consume. Include screenshot references at each point.
tests: Click at 00:05:30 + transcript entry at 00:05:28 -> correctly correlated
Screenshots referenced in timeline exist in S3
Session with no clicks (audio only) -> timeline still valid
Session with no audio (clicks only) -> timeline still valid
